---
title: "Impact Evaluation in Practice"
description: "Book overview and study-note index for Impact Evaluation in Practice."
book_id: "impact-evaluation-in-practice"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "gertler_martinez_premand_rawlings_vermeersch_2016_impact_evaluation_in_practice"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:impact-evaluation-in-practice:what-is-impact-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:impact-evaluation-in-practice:constructing-a-theory-of-change:c0001"
  - "chunk:impact-evaluation-in-practice:causal-inference:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Impact Evaluation in Practice

Study notes on *Impact Evaluation in Practice* [@gertler_martinez_premand_rawlings_vermeersch_2016_impact_evaluation_in_practice]. These notes are generated from source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>3 major-section notes</span>
  <span>2016</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
  <span>MCP evaluation-texts</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across these notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, page ranges, and reading routes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the notes.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2016</span><span>MCP evaluation-texts</span><span>Status: needs_review</span><span>Book overview</span></div>

This index summarises generated study notes for Paul J. Gertler, Sebastian Martinez, Patrick Premand, Laura B. Rawlings, and Christel M. J. Vermeersch's *Impact Evaluation in Practice* [@gertler_martinez_premand_rawlings_vermeersch_2016_impact_evaluation_in_practice]. The generated pages use selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Impact evaluation estimates causal effects by turning policy questions into testable designs with credible counterfactuals.

## Major-Section Notes

- [What Is Impact Evaluation?](section-01-what-is-impact-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 37
- [Constructing a Theory of Change](section-02-constructing-theory-of-change.qmd) - source pages 62
- [Causal Inference and Counterfactuals](section-03-causal-inference-counterfactuals.qmd) - source pages 77-78

## References
